mapper.select: select d.id, d.project_id as projectId, d.project_add_record_id as projectAddRecordId, d.name, d.alias, d.price, d.remark, d.create_by as createBy, d.create_time as createTime, d.update_by as updateBy, d.update_time as updateTime from doc_project_add_record_detail d where d.project_add_record_id = #{projectAddRecordId} and d.del_flag = '0' order by d.create_time asc
